title: 第 47 節
en: BftAIIMANIC TEACHERS. 437 The most important of them stands at the end of the whole work, and consists of fifty-five names ; the last of the human teachers being again Kasyapa, who here is supposed to have received his revelation from Vach, the goddess of speech. She received it through Ambhini from Aditya, the sun. Among the successors of Kasyapa we mark the 10th, Yajnavalkya, the pupil of Uddalaka and the teacher of Asuri ; and the 15th, Sanjiviputra. Sanjiviputra seems to have united two lines of teachers ; he was the pupil of Karsakeyiputra, and, according to the Vansa of the 10th book, he was likewise the pupil of Mandukayani, the 9th successor of Tura Kavasheya, who is fabled to have received his revelation, not through the agency of Vach, Ambhini, and Aditya, but direct from Prajapati and the self-existing Brahman. There are two other Vansas, one at the end of the Madhukanda, the other at the end of the Yajnavalkiya-kanda. Both are, in reality, varieties of one and the same Vansa, their differences arising from the confusion caused by the recurrence of similar names. That of the Madhukanda consists of sixty names, only forty-five or forty-six of which have an historical appearance. The principal divine teachers after Brahman, the Self-existing, are Parameshthin (Prajapati ?), Mrityu (death), Dadhyach Atharvana, and the two Asvins.

At the end of the Khila-kanda a fifth list is found, not a Vansa, but a list of teachers who handed down the Vansa. This seems to be ascribed to Uddalaka Aruneya, the teacher of Yajnavalkya, as its original author.
Lists of Teachers from the Satapatha-brahmana.
1. Saurpanayya. The same as in the Ma- 2. Gautama. dhukanda.
4. Vatsya and Parasarya. 1 5. Sankritya and Bha- radvaja.
10. Saunaka and Atreya, Jaivantayana instead ot and Raibhya. Atreya.
11. Pautimashyayana and The same as in the Ma- Kaundinyayana. dhukanda.
14. Kaundinya and Ag- Kaundinya and Agni- nivesya. vesya.
16. P&rasarya. The same as in the Ma- 17. J&tukarnya. dhukanda.
1 When there are two teachers, it is always the second through whom the tradition was carried on, except in No. 28. where there has evidently been a great confusion.
19. Bharadvaja and Asu- rayana and Gauta- ma.
zh: 最重要的一份記載位於整部著作的末尾，由五十五個名字組成；其中最後一位人類教師再次是迦葉波（Kasyapa），他在此據說從語言女神瓦恰（Vach）那裡接受啟示。瓦恰從安婆尼（Ambhini）那裡接受啟示，而安婆尼則從太陽神阿蒂亞（Aditya）那裡接受啟示。在迦葉波的傳承者中，我們注意到第十位是耶若那瓦爾基耶（Yajnavalkya），乌陀羅迦（Uddalaka）的弟子和阿蘇里（Asuri）的教師；以及第十五位是三吉婆普特拉（Sanjiviputra）。三吉婆普特拉似乎統合了兩條教師傳承；他是迦爾薩凱伊普特拉（Karsakeyiputra）的弟子，而根據第十本書的《傳承》（Vansa），他同時也是曼度迦耶尼（Mandukayani）的弟子，後者是圖羅·迦婆舍耶（Tura Kavasheya）的第九位傳承者，圖羅·迦婆舍耶據傳並非透過瓦恰、安婆尼和阿蒂亞的中介，而是直接從造物主（Prajapati）和自存的梵天（Brahman）那裡接受啟示。還有另外兩份《傳承》，一份在蜜酒讚頌篇（Madhukanda）的末尾，另一份在耶若那瓦爾基耶讚頌篇（Yajnavalkiya-kanda）的末尾。兩者實際上是同一份《傳承》的變異版本，其差異源自於相似名字重複出現所造成的混淆。蜜酒讚頌篇中的版本由六十個名字組成，其中僅四十五或四十六個具有歷史面貌。自存梵天（Brahman）之後的主要神聖教師是帕拉梅什丁（Parameshthin，可能即造物主？）、死亡神彌利土（Mrityu）、達德亞恰·阿闥婆那（Dadhyach Atharvana）以及兩位阿斯溫神（Asvins）。
在《吠陀》附篇（Khila-kanda）末尾，發現有第五份清單，並非《本生譚》（Vansa），而是一份傳承《本生譚》的教師名單。這份清單似乎被歸為烏答羅迦‧阿魯尼亞（Uddalaka Aruneya）所作，他是雅知那瓦爾基亞（Yajnavalkya）的師父。
蜜酒篇。耶祇那瓦爾基亞篇。
蘇爾潘耶亞（Saurpanayya）。與摩笯坎達（Madhukanda）中相同。 高塔瑪（Gautama）。
4. 瓦茨亞（Vatsya）和帕拉薩里亞（Parasarya）。¹ 5. 桑克里特亞（Sankritya）和婆羅多闍（Bharadvaja）。
8. 毘耶娑帕耶那（Vaijavapayana）及毘濕塔普雷耶（Vaishtapureya）。
10. 紹納卡（Saunaka）及阿特雷亞（Atreya），詹凡塔亞那（Jaivantayana）而非賴跋亞（Raibhya）與阿特雷亞（Atreya）。
11. 波悌瑪奢延那（Pautimashyayana）與 與摩陀闍那經（Madhukanda）中相同。 昆底尼亞延那（Kaundinyayana）。
我注意到您提供的「英文原文」實際上是梵文文本（Kaundinyau. Aurnavabh&h.），而非英文。 根據您的規則第2條，我只應翻譯英文原文，梵文文本不在翻譯範圍內。 請提供實際的英文原文，我將按照您的規則進行翻譯。
12. 考恩迪尼亞（Kaundinya）。考恩迪尼亞。
14. 郭那地耶與阿格尼‧尼跋舍耶
16. 帕拉薩里亞（P&rasarya）。與《摩奴法論》中相同。 17. 傑圖迦耳尼亞（J&tukarnya）。
當有兩位教師時，傳統的延續向來通過第二位進行，除第 28 號情況外，在該處顯然發生了極大的混亂。
19. 婆羅多瓦耶（Bharadvaja）與阿蘇羅耶那（Asurayana）及高塔馬（Gautama）。
